title: Link monday with whatsapp
excerpt: I automated one of my boards to do documents PDF based on the information on the dashboard. I want to know if there is a way to connect whatsapp with monday to send that document with a button through whatsapp.

posts.author: grupol2f2 (Luis G)
posts.cookedHtml: I automated one of my boards to do documents PDF based on the information on the dashboard. I want to know if there is a way to connect whatsapp with monday to send that document with a button through whatsapp.

posts.author: GiannisKoukounas (Giannis Koukounas)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @grupol2f2 !

While I have not used it myself, I know that this WhatsApp and monday integration was recently released , so you might want to look into it and/or contact the team to see if it is the right fit for you.

Hope this helps!

Giannis, Implementation Consultant at thespelas.com

posts.author: hellotimi (David Kalu (Formula Pro - Use formula column results in automations!))
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @grupol2f2 ,

We built an app that does exactly this. It’s called SuperSend. It allows you to communicate over whatsapp, imessage and telegram on monday.

We are constantly adding features.

You can check it out here: SuperSend - monday.com Marketplace

Or if you want an automation, you can use this app with this recipe to get a whatsapp link for any phone number:

Screenshot 2024-12-20 at 15.18.302632×1044 192 KB

Hope that helps.

posts.author: AnishJ (Anish)
posts.cookedHtml:
Luis G:

I automated one of my boards to do documents PDF based on the information on the dashboard. I want to know if there is a way to connect whatsapp with monday to send that document with a button through whatsapp.

the issue is the documents you generates are not public link I am assuming you saved them in monday file column so I don’t think you can send the document but if you want to send link of that document you can checkout whatsapp notify (my app)
